---
title: "Notes on :_Adaptive landscapes, genetic distance and the evolution of quantitative characters"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cosmo
    css: style.css
---

\newcommand{\C}{\mathbb{C}}
\newcommand{\R}{\mathbb{R}}
\newcommand{\Z}{\mathbb{Z}}
\newcommand{\N}{\mathbb{N}}
\newcommand{\<}{\left<}
\newcommand{\>}{\right>}
\newcommand{\ra}{\rightarrow}
